title: WA Robot Rules Show Response
description: Schema for the data field when calling 'wa robot rules show <rule_id>'. Returns the full detail payload for a single detection rule.

agent_type.description: Agent type this rule applies to

event_type.description: Event type produced by the rule

severity.description: Severity level emitted by the rule

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what the rule detects

anchors.description: Anchor strings used for candidate generation

regex.description: Optional regex used for extraction or validation

workflow.description: Optional workflow triggered by this rule

manual_fix.description: Manual operator fix instructions when automation is insufficient
